on_start.default: We start by raising our legs on a chair with lateral raises. Sit on a chair.

on_warning.In_Base_pos_left: Please put your hands from each other to horizontal position and lift your left leg.
on_warning.In_Base_pos_right: Please put your hands from each other to horizontal position and lift your right leg.

tpose_arms_above.ForefootingRoz_a_zdvihni_pravu_nohu: Move your hands down to a horizontal position and lift your right leg.
tpose_arms_above.ForefootingRoz_a_zdvihni_lavu_nohu: Move your hands down to a horizontal position and lift your left leg.
tpose_arms_above.default: Move your hands down to a horizontal position.

tpose_arms_below.ForefootingRoz_a_zdvihni_pravu_nohu: Move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position and lift your right leg.
tpose_arms_below.ForefootingRoz_a_zdvihni_lavu_nohu: Move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position and lift your left leg.
tpose_arms_below.default: Move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position.

tpose_arms_wrong.ForefootingRoz_a_zdvihni_pravu_nohu: Try to place your arms horizontally and lift your right leg.
tpose_arms_wrong.ForefootingRoz_a_zdvihni_lavu_nohu: Try to place your arms horizontally and lift your left leg.
tpose_arms_wrong.default: Try to place your arms horizontally.

on_warning.default: Try to put your hands to horizontal position better.

on_phase.forefooting_rozpazovanie_en: End of exercise, let's get ready for the next exercise.
on_phase.forefooting_rozpazovanie_start: We start by raising our legs on a chair with lateral raises. Sit on a chair.
